reminder_hint: Igama eligciniwe (elincazelo nesibonelo) liyavela ukuze libuyekezwe. Kudinga ukungena ngemvume.
pron_hint: Lalela lo mugqa ngejubane elihlukene — izwi lemvelo lemvelo.
chat_speak_tip: Zwa amazwibela (noma umbhalo wakho) kancane, ngezwi lemvelo
login_open_browser: Kuvulwa isiphequluli ukuze ungene ngemvume nge-Google...
login_cancelled: Ukungena ngemvume kukhanseliwe noma kuphelelwe isikhathi. Zama futhi.
sub_add_tip: Layisha ifayela lamazwibela, noma hudula i-.srt iye kuvidiyo
sub_need_first: Vula ividiyo kuqala, bese ulayisha amazwibela ayo
loop_no_line: Awekho umugqa esikrinini — vula i-Loop ngesikhathi samazwibela
loop_mark_a: Maka u-A kuqala (futhi u-B kufanele abe ngemuva kuka-A)
focus_mode_tip: Ukufunda okugxilile: ukuma ngokuzenzakalela + ilupu yomusho
auto_ex_tip: Faka izivivinyo ngokuzenzakalelayo efilmini ngenkathi idlala
lesson_click_hint: Chofoza ithrekhi ukuze uqale isifundo sayo esiqondisiwe
stt_tip: Khiqiza amazwibela okukhuluma kuya embhalweni avela kumsindo
stt_unavailable: Amazwibela azenzakalelayo awatholakali kulokhu kwakhiwa (imodeli yokukhuluma ayikho).
fluency_tip: Humusha iqembu lemibhalo engezansi ngokushelela olimini lwakho (U)
fluency_instruction: Funda le migqa ubhale ukuhumusha okushelele kakhulu kwalesi siqeshana sonke olimini lwakho.
fluency_next_tip: Thatha iqembu lemibhalo engezansi ezungeze umzuzu wamanje
fluency_no_subs: Ayikho imibhalo engezansi ezungeze le ndawo okwamanje.
paraphrase_tip: Bhala kabusha umugqa wamanje ngamanye amazwi, olimini olufanayo (Y)
paraphrase_instruction: Bhala kabusha umugqa ogqamile ngendlela ehlukile, olimini olufanayo, ugcine incazelo yawo futhi uvumelane nendawo.
describe_scene_tip: Chaza isigcawu olimini olufundayo — isigcawu siyaphindaphinda (D)
describe_take_tip: Chaza isithombe esisodwa olimini olufundayo — ifilimu iyema (T)
describe_scene_instruction: Buka isigcawu esiphindaphindayo bese uchaza okwenzekayo, olimini olufundayo. Sebenzisa imigqa engezansi njengomongo.
describe_take_instruction: Ifilimu imile. Chaza lesi sithombe — okubonayo — olimini olufundayo. Sebenzisa imigqa engezansi njengomongo.
dialogue_tip: Lingisa ingxoxo — ukhuluma umlingiswa oyedwa, ifilimu ikulindile (I)
dialogue_echo_hint: Ifilimu idlala umugqa, bese yehlisa umsindo futhi iyawuphindaphinda — usho phezu kwawo (ukusithwa), bese uqhubeka.
lang_topup_ready: Ukuhumusha okusha kukulungele — qala kabusha ukuze ukusebenzise.
listening_tip: Imodi yokulalela: fihla imibhalo engezansi + i-AI ibuza imibuzo yokuqonda (G)
listening_on: Imodi yokulalela: imibhalo engezansi efihliwe + imibuzo ye-AI
listening_fallback_q: Kwathiwa ini? Phendula engxoxweni, bese uthayipha 'qhubeka'.
sub_hidden: Amazwibela afihliwe (hambisa igundane phansi ukuze uwabone)
videos_hint: Amagama owawonga nge + kumazwibela omdlali. Chofoza igama uye kuvidiyo elivela kuyo; sebenzisa inkinobho yengxoxo ubuze i-AI. Chofoza kwesokudla ukuze uthole imininingwane, engeza ohlwini lwami lwamagama noma ususe.
videos_empty: Awukho amagama okwamanje. Cindezela + kumazwibela ngenkathi ubuka ividiyo.
videos_no_source: Leli gama alinayo ifilimu yomthombo eligciniwe.
vision_key_help: Ukuze uhlole 'chaza isimo/ithatha' nge-AI ebona ngempela ifreyimu, namathisela ukhiye we-OpenRouter wamahhala. Ukwenza owodwa kumahhala (ayikho ikhadi) futhi amamodeli wokubona asetshenziswa awabizi.
vision_key_set: Isimo: ukhiye umisiwe — ukuhlaziya izithombe kuvuliwe.
vision_key_unset: Isimo: awukho ukhiye okwamanje — ukuhlola kusebenza ngombhalo kuphela.
vision_key_prompt: Namathisela ukhiye wakho we-OpenRouter (shiya ungenalutho ukuze ususe):
vision_key_saved: Ukhiye ugciniwe — ukuhlaziya izithombe kunikwe amandla
need_login_vocab: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ungeze ohlwini lwakho olukhulu lwamagama.
add_word_personalise_tip: Engeza ukuhumusha kwakho kanye nenothi ngaphambi kokugcina ku-akhawunti yakho yewebhu
add_word_hint: Lihlele ngendlela yakho — ligcinwa ku-akhawunti yakho ye-Lexio yewebhu.
add_word_synced: Ungene ngemvume — lokhu kugcina ku-akhawunti yakho yewebhu.
add_word_local_only: Awungenanga ngemvume — ngena ukuze kufinyelele ku-akhawunti yakho yewebhu.
lang_failed: Ayikwazanga ukuhumusha isikhombisi. Zama futhi kamuva.
lang_restart_body: Qala kabusha umdlali manje ukuze usebenzise {lang}?
chat_welcome:
Buza ngevidiyo

Isb.: "Chaza lo mqondo"
"Humusha le ngxenye"
greet_user: Sawubona {name}! Ngiyawazi amavidiyo akho namagama agciniwe — ngibuza noma yini.
prac_loop_b_tip: Maka ukuphela komjikelezo bese uyivula (ngokwenza ngesandla)
loop_a_marked: Iphuzu A limisiwe ku-{t} — manje maka B
subs_hidden: Amazwibela afihliwe (hambisa igundane phansi ukuze ubone)
ph_hint:
Lexio Study Player

Ctrl+O  vula
Space  dlala/misa
sub_online_tip: Sesha i-OpenSubtitles ukuze uthole umbhalo wale vidiyo
subsearch_none: Ayikho imibhalo etholiwe — zama isihloko esilula.
subsearch_fail: Ukusesha kuhlulekile. Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho bese uzama futhi.
subsearch_dl_fail: Ayikwazanga ukulanda lowo mbhalo. Zama omunye.
subsearch_hint: Cindezela kabili umphumela ukuze ulande futhi ulayishe.
sub_menu_tip: Cindezela kwesokudla: imibhalo emibili/emithathu nokuhumusha okuzenzakalelayo
sub_mgr_btn_tip: Phatha imibhalo engezansi — ungabonisa kuze kube emithathu ngesikhathi esisodwa (eyokuqala + izihumusho)
sub_mgr_intro: Bonisa imibhalo engezansi efika kwemithathu inqwabelene evidiyo ngesikhathi esisodwa. Eyokuqala yilokho okufundayo; eminye iyizihumusho/ukusekela.
sub_mgr_autotr: Noma humusha ngokuzenzakalela umugqa wesibili uye ku-{lang} nge-AI
sub_mgr_note: Imigqa yesibili/yesithathu iwukusekela ukufunda kuphela — ayishintshi amakhadi wamagama (lawo ahlala ngolimi lokuqala).
subs_feed_empty: Layisha umbhalo ukuze ubone imigqa lapha — amagama abalulekile angenwe umugqa futhi achofozeka.
subs_feed_hint: Ilandela ividiyo. Chofoza igama ukuze uthole imininingwane; chofoza isikhathi ukuze ugxume lapho.
